Model predictive control

1. Key components:

  1. A system model (describe the relationship between input and states)
  2. A cost function (a function take input and states to get a cost)
  3. Some constraints (the input and states should be within a range)
  4. An optimizer that tune the input within all constraints to get the minimum (maximum) cost.

2. process

  • The tuned input is a sequence, which predict into the future. But the system only take the first input for the next time step, measure new system states, and repeat the prediction to generate a new input.

3. Characteristics:

  • Main drawabck: need of identifying the open-loop model offline

4. Linear MPC (CDC'19 workshop, slides 1)

4.1. Linear predict model:

{xk+1=Axk+Bukyk=Cxk

⇒xk+1=Ak+1x0+∑i=0kAiBuk−i, yk=C(Akx0+∑i=0k−1AiBuk−1−i)　　　　Eq. yk of LMPC

  • 与线性控制模型的关系：
    若把线性控制模型写为x˙=A′x+B′u，那么下一状态为xk+1=x˙+xk=(A′xk+B′uk)+xk=(A′+I)xk+B′uk
    {A=A′+IB=B′

4.2. Performance index (without constraint)

  • Performance index defined as:
    J(z,x0)=xN′PxN+∑k=0N−1xk′Qxk+uk′Ruk
    R=R′≻0(for input cost)Q=Q′⪰0(for stage cost)P=P′⪰0(for terminal cost)z=[u0u1⋮uN−1]

  • Optimization:

    Derivation J(z,x0)=x0′Qx0+[x1x2⋮xN]′[Q00⋯00Q0⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮0⋯0Q000⋯0P]⏟Q¯[x1x2⋮xN]+[u0u1⋮uN−1]′[R0⋯00R⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮0⋯0R]⏟R¯[u0u1⋮uN−1][x1x2⋮xN]=[B0⋯0ABB⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮AN−1BAN−2B⋯B]⏟S¯[u0u1⋮uN−1]⏟z+[AA2⋮AN]⏟T¯x0J(z,x0)=(S¯z+T¯x0)′Q¯(S¯z+T¯x0)+z′R¯z+x0′Qx0=12z′2(R¯+S¯′Q¯S¯)⏟Hz+x0′2T¯′Q¯S¯⏟F′z+12x0′2(Q+T¯′Q¯T¯)⏟Yx0

    J(z,x0)=12z′Hz+x0′F′z+12x0′Yx0，其中H=H′,Y=Y′
    x0为初始状态，为给定值，R，Q，P为给定（所以H，F，Y也固定），x0′Yx0为常量
    To optimizing the MPC: ∇zJ(z,x0)=Hz+Fx0=0⇒z∗=−H−1Fx0
    QP：minzf(z)=12z′Hz+x′F′z

4.3. Performance with constraint

  • Add constraints to enforce:
    {umin≤u(t)≤umaxymin≤y(t)≤ymax

    Derivation {uk≤umax−uk≤−umin⇒[10⋯001⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮0⋯01−10⋯00−1⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮0⋯0−1]z≤[umaxumax⋮umax−umin−umin⋮−umin]where z=[u0u1⋮uN−1]

    从yk of linear MPC可得
    C∑i=0k−1AiBuk−1−i=yk−CAkx0
    与上面类似，写作{∑i=0k−1AiBuk−1−i≤ymax−CAkx0−∑i=0k−1AiBuk−1−i≤−ymin+CAkx0
    可得

    [CB0⋯0CABCB⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮CAN−1B⋯CABCB−CB0⋯0−CAB−CB⋯0⋮⋮⋱⋮−CAN−1B⋯−CAB−CB]z≤[ymaxymax⋮ymax−ymin−ymin⋮−ymin]+[−CA−CA2⋮−CANCACA2⋮CAN]x0

    可见两组条件都可以写作线性形式
    把两组矩阵上下拼接一下，合成一个矩阵等式

    [I−ICA∗B thing−CA∗B thing]z≤[umax−uminymax−ymin]+[00−CA∗ thingCA∗ thing]x0

    由上可知两个条件均可以写为线性形式：Gz≤W+Sx0
    所以此时需要优化的方程为：
    J(z,x0)=12x0′Yx0+minz12z′Hz+x0′F′zs.t. Gz≤W+Sx0

4.4. Tracking, disturbances, and delay

4.4.1. Tracking

4.4.2. Disturbances

  • Measured disturbance v(t) (from input)
    {xk+1=Axk+Buk+Bvv(t)yk=Cxk+Dvv(t)
    ⇒xk=Akx0+∑i=0k−1AiBuk−1−i+AiBvv(t)

  • Get QP:
    minz12z′Hz+[x(t)r(t)u(t−1)v(t)]′F′zs.t.Gz≤W+S[x(t)r(t)u(t−1)v(t)]

4.5. Feasibility, convergence and Stability

4.5.1. Convergence

  • Use the Value function V∗(x(t))=min∑k=0N−1xk′Qxk+uk′Ruk, xN=0（其中xN=0为terminal constraint） as a Lyapunov-like function。

5. Linear time-varying MPC (CDC'19 slides No. 2a)

5.1. LPV (Linear parameter-varying) models

  • Linear, parameters change with time, with disturbance
    {xk+1=A(p(t))xk+B(p(t))uk+Bv(p(t))v(t)yk=C(p(t))xk+Dv(p(t))v(t)

  • Get QP:
    minz12z′H(p(t))z+[x(t)r(t)u(t−1)]′F(p(t))′zs.t.G(p(t))z≤W(p(t))+S(p(t))[x(t)r(t)u(t−1)]

5.2. LTV (linear time-varying) model

  • Model change over time (k: prediction horizon)

  • The measure distubance is embedded in the model(?)
    {xk+1=Ak(t)xk+Bk(t)ukyk=Ck(t)xk

  • Get QP:
    minz12z′H(t)z+[x(t)r(t)u(t−1)]′F(t)′zs.t.G(t)z≤W(t)+S(t)[x(t)r(t)u(t−1)]

6. Non-linear MPC

6.1. Model:

  • Model
    {xk+1=f(xk,uk)yk=g(xk,uk)

  • Constraints: h(xk,uk)≤0

6.2. Performance index:

  • Performance index
    minlN(xN)+∑k=0N−1l(xk,uk)

  • Need to check what this is
    min∑k=0N−1∥Wy(yk−r(t))∥22+∥Wu(uk−ur(t))∥22
    s.t.xk+1=f(xk,uk)yk=g(xk,uk)h(uk,xk,yk)≤0

r(t) is reference (course slides 2, p26)

6.3. Solver

  • Linearizing to get LPV/LTV model?

  • SQP? Sequential quadratic programming
    Sequential quadratic programming

6.4. Kalman filter fits here?!

6.5. Single shooting vs. multiple shooting (CDC'19 slides No. 2a, p14)

  • Single shooting:
    From x(t0) integrate the system on the whole horizon → continuous trajectory

  • Multiple shooting:
    From x(tk) integrate the system on each interval separately → discontinuous trajectory

  • RTI
    Real time iteration

  • Comparison:

    Multiple shooting Single shooting
    Unstable system better
    Initialization of states
    at intermediate nodes    		 better
    QP/NLP bigger
    Nnx+(N−1)nu opt. vars (x0,u0,x1,u1,⋯,xN)    		 nx+(N−1)nu opt. vars (x0,u0,x1,u1,⋯,uN−1)

8. Hybrid and stochastic MPC (CDC'19 slides No. 3)

  • MIP

9. MPC with RL (CDC'19 slides No. 4)

MPC RL
policy πθ(s)=arg⁡minx,uVθf(xN) optimal policy
π∗(s)=arg⁡minaL(s,a)+γE[V∗(s+)∣(s,a)]
Value Vθ(s)=minx,uVθf(xN)+∑k=0N−1Lθ(x,u)

LQR case:
Vt(x(t))=minu[x(T)TQfx(T)+∫tT(x(t)TQx(t)+u(t)TRu(t))dt]
value为VT，reward为∫tT(x(t)TQx(t)+u(t)TRu(t))dt		 optimal value
V∗(s)=L(s,π∗(s))+γE[V∗(s+)∣s,π∗(s)]

v∗(s)=maxa∑s′,rp(s′,r∣s,a)[r+γv∗(s′)]
Q-value Qθ(s,a)=minx,uVθf(xN)+∑k=0N−1Lθ(x,u) optimal action-value
q∗(s,a)=L(s,a)+γE[V∗]=L(s,a)+γE[mina+Q∗(s+,a+)∣s,a]

q∗(s,a)=∑s′,rp(s′,r∣s,a)[r+γmaxa′q∗(s′,a′)]=E[Rt+1+γv∗(St+1)∣St=s,At=a]

9.1. Reinforcement learning

9.1.1. Policy evaluation (include value evaluation/prediction and q evaluation/control)

  • Monte Carlo

    • prediction
      V(s)≈∑i=1nG(s)/n
    • control
      Q(s,a)≈∑i=1nG(s,a)/n

  • Temporal Difference

    • prediction: TD(0)
      V(St)←V(St)+α[Rt+1+γV(St+1)−V(St)]
    • control: SARSA/Q-learning
      SARSA: Q(St,At)←Q(St,At)+α[Rt+1+γQ(St+1,At+1)−Q(St,At)]
      Q-learning: Q(St,At)=Q(St,At)+α[Rt+1+γmaxaQ(St+1,a)−Q(St,At)]

9.1.2. Policy optimization

  • Greedy policy updates

    • Value evaluation: 用于model-based的optimization。π′(s)=arg⁡minaL(s,a),γE[V(s+)|s,a]
    • Q evaluation：用于model-free的optimization。π′(s)=arg⁡minaQ(s,a)

  • ϵ-greedy

  • Exploration vs. exploitation

    • Greedy in the limit with inﬁnite exploration, e.g., ϵ-greedy with → 0

9.1.3. Abstract/generalize

  • Curse of dimensionality
  • Function approximation
    (I think they combine this with the Q-learning part. Or maybe just use Q-learning as an example?)

9.1.4. Q-learning

  • Curse of dimensionality
  • Function approximation(Use MPC here)
    Ref Gros' paper @ TAC2020

9.1.5. Policy search

9.2. MPC

Vθ(s)=minx,uVθf(xN)+∑k=0N−1Lθ(x,u)πθ(s)=arg⁡minx,uVθf(xN)Qθ(s,a)=minx,uVθf(xN)+∑k=0N−1Lθ(x,u)s.t. x0=s,u0=a,xk+1=fθ(xk,uk),hθ(xk,uk)≤0,xN∈Xθf.

10. Adding safty constraints

  1. Adding extra terms to quadratic function
    Linear quadratic function optimazing the cost to minimium. By adding extra penalty to the cost function to make the cost →∞。
  2. Mixed-integer programming solver.
